channel.title: Posts on KAI's Homepage
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on KAI's Homepage

item.title: Projects
item.description: 纵向课题 稀疏稳健分类模型的正则化理论和应用研究 重庆师范大学博士启动基金项目（编号：23XLB020），25万元，2023.10-2025.10主持，在研 成渝双城经济圈一体化现代化发展评价指标体系及优化路径研究重庆市教委科学技术研究计划青年项目（编号：KJQN202301541），4万元，2024.01-2026.12主研，在研 横向课题 No record.

item.title: Publications
item.description: Accepted and published Fused robust geometric nonparallel hyperplane support vector machine for pattern classification Ruiyao Gao, Qi Kai, Yang Hu*. [PaperLink] Expert Systems with Applications, 2024, 236: 121331. Capped asymmetric elastic net support vector machine for robust binary classification Qi Kai, Yang Hu*. [PaperLink] International Journal of Intelligent Systems, 2023, 2023(1): 2201330. LS-GNHSVM: a novel unified nonparallel hyperplane classifier with geometrical rationality Qi Kai, Yang Hu*. [PaperLink] Expert Systems with Applications, 2023, 215: 119413.

item.title: Talks
item.description: Capped asymmetric elastic net support vector machine for robust binary classification ICSA 2023 China Conference (2023)，oral reportChengdu · China Joint rescaled asymmetric least squared nonparallel support vector machine with a stochastic quasi-Newton based algorithm (Student best paper)The 8th annual conference of CQSIAM (2022)，oral reportChongqing · China Joint sparse principal component regression with robust property (Student best paper)The 7th annual conference of CQSIAM (2021)，oral reportChongqing · China Elastic net nonparallel hyperplane support vector machine and its geometrical rationalityThe 18th annual conference of CSIAM (2020)，oral reportHunan · China
